property.name: sun.java.command
property.value: build/sbt-launch-1.9.9.jar set every scalafmtCheck := {} set (kernelUnityCatalog / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty set (kernelDefaults / Compile / compile) := sbt.internal.inc.Analysis.empty spark/testOnly org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1InsertIntoSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1SaveSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnDFWriterV1SaveAsTableSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceUsingDFWriterV1InsertIntoSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceUsingDFWriterV1SaveSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceUsingDFWriterV1SaveAsTableSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnOrUsingDFOptionCombinationSuite org.apache.spark.sql.delta.DeltaInsertReplaceOnOrUsingDFv2CreateReplaceBlockingSuite

testcase.name: `replaceOn` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceOn` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, saveAsTable path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceOn` option, saveAsTable path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
DataFrameWriterV2 overwrite(predicate) should be invalid with `replaceOn` option
DataFrameWriterV2 overwritePartitions should be invalid with `replaceOn` option
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=true, partitionOverwriteMode=STATIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=true, partitionOverwriteMode=DYNAMIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=false, partitionOverwriteMode=STATIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceOn` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=false, partitionOverwriteMode=DYNAMIC
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceOn`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceOn`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceOn`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceOn`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceOn`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceOn`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceOn`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceOn`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceOn`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true in Append mode should just append with `replaceOn`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceOn`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceOn`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceOn`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`replaceWhere` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, insertInto path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`partitionOverwriteMode` should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option, saveAsTable path-based DataFrameWriterV1 API
DataFrameWriterV2 overwrite(predicate) should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option
DataFrameWriterV2 overwritePartitions should be invalid with `replaceUsing` option
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=true, partitionOverwriteMode=STATIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=true, partitionOverwriteMode=DYNAMIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=false, partitionOverwriteMode=STATIC
SQL session config DPO should not affect `replaceUsing` option, save DataFrameWriterV1 API, enableDynamicPartitionOverwrite=false, partitionOverwriteMode=DYNAMIC
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceUsing`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceUsing`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=false should be valid with `replaceUsing`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=false should be invalid with `replaceUsing`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true in Append mode should just append with `replaceUsing`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceUsing`, save DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceUsing`, saveAsTable DataFrameWriterV1 API
`dataChange`=true should be valid with `replaceUsing`, insertInto DataFrameWriterV1 API
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceOn` (case insensitive)
`overwriteSchema`=true should be invalid with `replaceUsing` (case insensitive)
